title: Earthquake Safety and Preparedness Guide
narration: Start by identifying the safest places in every room. Stay clear of windows, heavy furniture, fireplaces, and unsecured exterior walls.
visual: 2D vector plan of a living room with green checkmarks marking safe spots away from glass and tall cabinets.
